name: Dark Star Lords Mausoleum

children.name: Feather Chest
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Feather) or ((IsDead(Angra Mainyu) or (Glitch(Costume Clip) and CanReach(DSLMTop))) and HorizontalAttack))

children.name: Ankh Chest DLM
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Grapple Claw))

children.name: Map Chest DLM
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Birth Sigil))

children.name: Aten-Ra

sections.name: Guardian
access_rules: $lm2_logic|HasAnkhFor(Aten-Ra) and ((IsDead(Sekhmet) or Glitch(Costume Clip)) and PuzzleFinished(White Pedestals) and (((Has(Chain Whip) or CanUse(Earth Spear) or CanUse(Flare) or CanUse(Chakrams) or CanUse(Bomb)) and OrbCount(6)) or ((Has(Flail Whip) or Has(Katana) or Has(Axe)) and OrbCount(5)) or (CanUse(Pistol) and OrbCount(4))))

sections.name: Dissonance DSLM
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Progressive Beherit) and IsDead(Aten-Ra))

sections.name: Crucifix Chest
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (IsDead(Aten-Ra) and HorizontalAttack)
$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain)

children.name: Maats Feather Chest
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (CanReach(AC Tablet) and IsDead(Ammit) and Has(Feather) and CanChant(Heaven) and CanChant(Sun) and CanChant(Earth) and CanChant(Fire) and IsDead(Sekhmet))

children.name: Research DSLM
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain)

sections.name: Shop Slot 1
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Feather))

sections.name: Shop Slot 2
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Feather))

sections.name: Shop Slot 3
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Feather))

children.name: Money Fairy
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (Has(Fairy Pass) and Has(Freyas Pendant) and CanReach(Annwfn Main) and (Has(Gale Fibula) or CanStopTime))

children.name: Sekhmet
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) and (CanChant(Heaven) and CanChant(Sun) and CanChant(Earth) and OrbCount(3) and (Has(Chain Whip) or Has(Rapier) or Has(Axe) or Has(Katana) or CanUse(Earth Spear) or CanUse(Bomb) or CanUse(Chakram) or CanUse(Pistol)))

children.name: Crystal Skull Chest DLM
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (SkullCount(1) and (Has(Feather) or CanWarp or (CanReach(DSLM Main) and CanUse(Bomb))))

children.name: La Mulana Chest
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (CanUse(Bomb) and (Has(Feather) or CanWarp or CanReach(DSLM Main)))

children.name: Vessel Chest
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (IsDead(Ammit) and HorizontalAttack)

children.name: Angra Mainyu
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (Has(Mjolnir) and OrbCount(1) and (CanWarp or Has(Feather) or CanReach(DSLM Main)))

children.name: Ammit
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMTop) and (Has(Feather) and Has(Pyramid Crystal) and Has(Silver Shield) and OrbCount(3) and (Has(Chain Whip) or Has(Knife) or Has(Axe) or Has(Katana) or CanUse(Earth Spear) or CanUse(Bomb) or CanUse(Chakram) or CanUse(Pistol)))

children.name: Night Mantra Mural
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(Nibiru) and (Has(Death Sigil) and Has(Snapshot) and Has(Claydoll Suit))

children.name: Dissonance Nibiru
access_rules: $lm2_logic|CanReach(Nibiru) and (Has(Progressive Beherit) and Has(Power Band) and Has(Mjolnir) and Has(Claydoll Suit) and NibiruSkullCheck())
$lm2_logic|CanReach(DSLMMain) or CanReach(DSLMTop) or CanReach(Nibiru)
